raw_consumer_statement: I've been on the phone for about 15 hours between citi bank and paypal. What Happened I purchased tickets through XXXX and they never delivered tickets. I opened disputes through Citi ( my funding bank for PayPal Pay in 4 ). StubHub refunded me via PayPal and paypal applied it to my pay in 4 because they said Citi took the funds from paypal as soon as I created the disputes. Because I cancelled the Citi disputes, Citi said since they were cancelled they sent the funds back to PayPal. PayPal applied StubHubs refund directly against my Pay in 4 balance ( instead of pushing it back to Citi to offset what Citi already provisionally credited ( or so what they say they credited ). Paypal is saying they can not locate the reversed payments citi supposedly sent to paypal and citi bank will not give me proof like a statement or screenshot. Citi said they sent back paypal the money here are the reference numbers XX/XX/XXXX Ref number : XXXX XX/XX/XXXX Ref number : XXXX XX/XX/XXXX Ref number : XXXX. Neither company is helping at the moment please help me.
